---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "CBSE / NCERT Class 9 Mathematics · 12 chapters · Real numbers, polynomials, Euclid's geometry, triangles, circles, Heron's formula, statistics"
---

## What this tier is for

This is the **CBSE / NCERT Class 9** track. It walks the rationalised
2023 NCERT textbook chapter by chapter and ends with you ready for the
Class 10 board year.

Class 9 is the year **proof** arrives. You learn that every claim about
shapes is a chain of small steps from agreed-upon postulates, that
numbers extend from rationals to reals, and that polynomials are objects
with a life of their own. By the end of Class 9 you can:

- Place **rational and irrational numbers** on the real number line and
  rationalise denominators.
- State and apply the **Remainder Theorem** and **Factor Theorem**;
  factorise polynomials using identities.
- Plot points and find quadrants in the **coordinate plane**.
- Solve and graph **linear equations in two variables**.
- Read and apply **Euclid's axioms and postulates** and write short
  geometric proofs.
- Use angle-sum properties of **lines, triangles, and quadrilaterals**;
  prove **congruence** by SSS, SAS, ASA, AAS, RHS.
- Apply **circle theorems** (equal chords, angles in the same segment,
  cyclic quadrilaterals).
- Compute the area of a triangle by **Heron's formula** when only the
  three sides are known.
- Compute **surface areas and volumes** of cuboids, cylinders, cones,
  spheres, and hemispheres.
- Summarise data with **frequency tables, bar graphs, histograms,
  frequency polygons** and the **mean / median / mode** of ungrouped
  data.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Number Systems] --> B[02 · Polynomials]
    C[03 · Coordinate Geometry] --> D[04 · Linear Equations 2 Vars]
    E[05 · Euclid's Geometry] --> F[06 · Lines & Angles]
    F --> G[07 · Triangles]
    G --> H[08 · Quadrilaterals]
    F --> I[09 · Circles]
    G --> J[10 · Heron's Formula]
    A --> J
    K[11 · Surface Areas & Volumes]
    L[12 · Statistics]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Number Systems**](01-number-systems/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Polynomials**](02-polynomials/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · Coordinate Geometry**](03-coordinate-geometry/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · Linear Equations in Two Variables**](04-linear-equations-two-vars/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Introduction to Euclid's Geometry**](05-euclids-geometry/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Lines and Angles**](06-lines-and-angles/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Triangles**](07-triangles/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · Quadrilaterals**](08-quadrilaterals/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · Circles**](09-circles/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · Heron's Formula**](10-herons-formula/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Surface Areas and Volumes**](11-surface-areas-and-volumes/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · Statistics**](12-statistics/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
